manifest.description: Substack plugin for Paperclip. Fetches recent posts and public engagement stats via RSS and the Substack reader API.
manifest.author: @bbugs280

tools.name: substack-get-posts
tools.description: Fetch recent posts from a Substack publication via RSS. Returns title, date, URL, and preview.

publicationUrl.description: The Substack publication URL, e.g. newworldvalue.substack.com

limit.description: Max number of posts to return (default: 10)

tools.name: substack-get-post-stats
tools.description: Fetch like count and comment count for a specific Substack post using the public reader API.

postUrl.description: Full URL of the Substack post, e.g. https://newworldvalue.substack.com/p/some-post
